title: tylomium assurgens
intro: Tylomium assurgens, also known as the Spring Coralroot, is a perennial orchid native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Traditionally, the Spring Coralroot has been used to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Tylomium assurgens typically involve drying and processing the root, which can be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
